src.osir_web.osir_web.pages.OsirWebCase module

Bases: object

static process_submission(profile_instance: OsirProfileModel = None, selected_modules: List[str] = None, modules_to_add: List[str] = [], modules_to_remove: List[str] = [], selected_case: str = None, reprocess_case: bool = False)[source]
static render()[source]
static tab1_main()[source]
static tab1_module_editor(selected_modules: list[str])[source]

Render an editor for the provided module(s). Intended to be called with a single module at a time for a no-scrolling UX.

Notes

  • Edits are stored in-memory only (self.edited_modules + st.session_state).

  • The underlying YAML files on disk are NOT modified.

  • Uses a guard to ignore transient empty values emitted by the editor when switching.

Parameters:

selected_modules (list[str]) – List of module basenames to edit (e.g., [“foo.yml”]).
